Question (NL): so sanh chi phi hoan tien tui cong va doanh thu ban tui cong trung binh moi user trong 6 thang qua
Business Rules / Notes:
- Chi phí: TOTAL_CASHBACK_GMV (0.1% hoàn tiền cho Túi+ users)
  - Doanh thu: Phí subscription — nhưng không có column trực tiếp, phải ước lượng từ PLUS_SEGMENT 
  (chứa suffix Buy) với data sau 2026-01-01, và chứa ''TTT+ 9k'' với data trước 2026-01-01
  - Upgrade: Nếu user đã có tier thấp (kể cả miễn phí) → mua tier cao hơn chỉ trả phần chênh lệch 
  - Detect upgrade: Dùng LAG(TIER) so sánh tier các ngày trước vs hiện tại
Gold SQL:
WITH monthly_user AS (
    -- Gom về 1 row / user / tháng
    SELECT
      DATE_TRUNC(GRASS_DATE, MONTH) AS month,
      CAST(REGEXP_EXTRACT(USER_ID, r'\d+') AS STRING) AS uid,
      -- Lấy segment + tier cuối tháng (ổn định nhất)
      ARRAY_AGG(PLUS_SEGMENT ORDER BY GRASS_DATE DESC LIMIT 1)[OFFSET(0)] AS plus_segment,        
      ARRAY_AGG(TIER ORDER BY GRASS_DATE DESC LIMIT 1)[OFFSET(0)] AS tier,
      -- Cashback = tích lũy hàng ngày → SUM cả tháng
      SUM(COALESCE(TOTAL_CASHBACK_GMV, 0)) AS cashback_gmv
    FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.mart_ttt_daily_user_record`
    WHERE GRASS_DATE BETWEEN '2025-09-01' AND '2026-02-28'
      AND PLUS_TYPE NOT IN ('0.Churn', 'None')
      AND PLUS_TYPE IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 1, 2
  ),

  with_prev_tier AS (
    -- Detect upgrade: so sánh tier tháng trước
    SELECT
      *,
      LAG(tier) OVER (PARTITION BY uid ORDER BY month) AS prev_tier
    FROM monthly_user
  ),

  revenue_calc AS (
    SELECT
      month, uid, cashback_gmv, plus_segment, tier, prev_tier,

      -- ===== ƯỚC LƯỢNG DOANH THU SUBSCRIPTION =====
      CASE
        -- [Pre-2026] Chỉ có 1 gói TTT+ 9k
        WHEN month < '2026-01-01'
          AND plus_segment = 'TTT+ 9k'
          THEN 9000

        -- [Post-2026] Silver + Buy = 9K (không có tier thấp hơn → luôn full)
        WHEN month >= '2026-01-01'
          AND plus_segment LIKE '%Silver%Buy%'
          THEN 9000

        -- [Post-2026] Gold + Buy: 19K full, hoặc chênh lệch nếu upgrade
        WHEN month >= '2026-01-01'
          AND plus_segment LIKE '%Gold%Buy%'
          THEN CASE
            WHEN prev_tier = 'Silver' THEN 19000 - 9000   -- upgrade Silver→Gold: 10K
            ELSE 19000                                      -- mua mới: 19K
          END

        -- [Post-2026] Platinum + Buy: 49K full, hoặc chênh lệch
        WHEN month >= '2026-01-01'
          AND plus_segment LIKE '%Platinum%Buy%'
          THEN CASE
            WHEN prev_tier = 'Gold'   THEN 49000 - 19000  -- upgrade Gold→Plat: 30K
            WHEN prev_tier = 'Silver' THEN 49000 - 9000   -- upgrade Silver→Plat: 40K
            ELSE 49000                                      -- mua mới: 49K
          END

        -- Các segment khác = được Túi+ miễn phí
        ELSE 0
      END AS est_revenue,

      -- Flag paid user
      CASE
        WHEN plus_segment = 'TTT+ 9k' THEN 1
        WHEN plus_segment LIKE '%Buy%' THEN 1
        ELSE 0
      END AS is_paid

    FROM with_prev_tier
  )

  -- ===== KẾT QUẢ CHÍNH: MONTHLY COMPARISON =====
  SELECT
    month,

    -- Tổng quan users
    COUNT(DISTINCT uid)                                                AS total_plus_users,       
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_paid = 1 THEN uid END)                AS paid_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cashback_gmv > 0 THEN uid END)           AS cashback_users,

    -- CHI PHÍ HOÀN TIỀN (Cashback 0.1%)
    ROUND(SUM(cashback_gmv), 0)                                       AS total_cashback_cost,     
    ROUND(SUM(cashback_gmv)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN cashback_gmv > 0
          THEN uid END), 0), 0)                                       AS avg_cashback_per_cb_user,
    ROUND(SUM(cashback_gmv)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT uid), 0), 0)                             AS
  avg_cashback_per_plus_user,

    -- DOANH THU BÁN TÚI+ (subscription)
    ROUND(SUM(est_revenue), 0)                                        AS
  total_subscription_revenue,
    ROUND(SUM(est_revenue)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_paid = 1
          THEN uid END), 0), 0)                                       AS
  avg_revenue_per_paid_user,
    ROUND(SUM(est_revenue)
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT uid), 0), 0)                             AS
  avg_revenue_per_plus_user,

    -- NET = Revenue - Cost (per Túi+ user)
    ROUND(
      (SUM(est_revenue) - SUM(cashback_gmv))
      / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT uid), 0), 0
    )                                                                  AS net_per_plus_user,      

    -- Ratio: doanh thu / chi phí
    ROUND(SUM(est_revenue)
      / NULLIF(SUM(cashback_gmv), 0), 4)                              AS revenue_cost_ratio       

  FROM revenue_calc
  GROUP BY month
  ORDER BY month
Gold Result (summary): 6 rows (Sep 2025 → Feb 2026):  Tổng tiền MoMo trả lại user (chi phí) , Tổng tiền user trả để mua Túi+ (doanh thu),   TB chi phí hoàn / user có nhận cashback,TB doanh thu / user trả tiền mua Túi+, Lãi/lỗ ròng trên mỗi user Túi+ ,  ROI >1 = lãi, <1 = lỗ

Question (NL): Top 10% user PayLater chiếm bao nhiêu % GMV? thang 12/2025
Business Rules / Notes: Dùng NTILE(10) hoặc PERCENT_RANK() để xác định top 10% user theo spending_vts. GMV = SUM(spending_vts). Tính % GMV của top 10% so với tổng GMV
Gold SQL:
WITH user_ranked AS (
  SELECT agent_id, spending_vts,
         NTILE(10) OVER (ORDER BY spending_vts DESC) AS decile
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`
  WHERE month_trans = '2025-12-01'
)
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN decile = 1 THEN agent_id END) AS top10pct_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agent_id) AS total_users,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decile = 1 THEN spending_vts ELSE 0 END) AS top10pct_gmv,
  SUM(spending_vts) AS total_gmv,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(
    SUM(CASE WHEN decile = 1 THEN spending_vts ELSE 0 END),
    SUM(spending_vts)
  ) AS top10pct_gmv_share
FROM user_ranked

Question (NL): User có first usecase là airtime/data thì second usecase tập trung vào usecase nào? thang 1/2026
Target Columns: user_id, core_id, service_category, created_millis, result_code, trans_type
Business Rules / Notes: Cần xác định thứ tự usecase theo thời gian cho mỗi user. Dùng ROW_NUMBER() PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_millis để rank transaction. First usecase = service_category của transaction đầu tiên. Lọc user có first usecase là AIRTIME hoặc DATA. Second usecase = service_category của transaction thứ 2 (khác service_category đầu). Filter: result_code = 0, trans_type IN ('pay_pl','pay_ins','send_pl')
Gold SQL:
WITH trans_ranked AS (
  SELECT user_id, service_category, created_millis,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY created_millis) AS rn
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_ALL_TRANS`
  WHERE result_code = 0
    AND trans_type IN ('pay_pl','pay_ins','send_pl')
    AND created_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-01-31' 
),
first_uc AS (
  SELECT user_id, service_category AS first_usecase
  FROM trans_ranked
  WHERE rn = 1
    AND UPPER(service_category) IN ('AIRTIME', 'DATA')
),
second_uc AS (
  SELECT t.user_id, t.service_category AS second_usecase
  FROM trans_ranked t
  JOIN first_uc f ON t.user_id = f.user_id
  WHERE t.rn > 1
    AND t.service_category != f.first_usecase
  QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY t.user_id ORDER BY t.created_millis) = 1
)
SELECT s.second_usecase,
       COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS user_count
FROM second_uc s
GROUP BY s.second_usecase
ORDER BY user_count DESC

Question (NL): User có đc tăng limit ở tháng 9/2025 thì tăng spending bn %? quan sat sau 3 tháng
Business Rules / Notes: Xác định user được tăng limit: so sánh credit_limit tháng N vs tháng N-1 bằng LAG(). Nếu credit_limit tăng → so sánh spending_vts trước/sau.
Gold SQL:
WITH user_monthly AS (
  SELECT agent_id, month_trans, credit_limit, spending_vts
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`
  WHERE month_trans BETWEEN '2025-08-01' AND '2026-01-01'
),

limit_increased AS (
  SELECT
    a.agent_id,
    a.spending_vts AS spending_before,
    t1.spending_vts AS spending_t1,
    t2.spending_vts AS spending_t2,
    t3.spending_vts AS spending_t3
  FROM user_monthly a
  JOIN user_monthly b
    ON a.agent_id = b.agent_id
    AND a.month_trans = '2025-08-01'
    AND b.month_trans = '2025-09-01'
    AND b.credit_limit > a.credit_limit
  LEFT JOIN user_monthly t1 ON a.agent_id = t1.agent_id AND t1.month_trans = '2025-10-01'
  LEFT JOIN user_monthly t2 ON a.agent_id = t2.agent_id AND t2.month_trans = '2025-11-01'
  LEFT JOIN user_monthly t3 ON a.agent_id = t3.agent_id AND t3.month_trans = '2025-12-01'
)

SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT agent_id) AS users,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(AVG(spending_t1) - AVG(spending_before), AVG(spending_before)) AS spending_change_t1_oct,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(AVG(spending_t2) - AVG(spending_before), AVG(spending_before)) AS spending_change_t2_nov,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(AVG(spending_t3) - AVG(spending_before), AVG(spending_before)) AS spending_change_t3_dec
FROM limit_increased

Question (NL): New MAU đang tăng từ gift nào?
Business Rules / Notes: first_trans_gift_list là REPEATED STRING (array gift IDs). Cần UNNEST để tách từng gift ID ra. New MAU = mau_type='1.New'. 'Đang tăng' = so sánh MoM. Agent phải biết dùng UNNEST cho REPEATED field trong BigQuery. COUNT DISTINCT agent_id theo gift_id, so sánh MoM xem gift nào đang drive new user tăng
Gold SQL:
WITH new_gift AS (
  SELECT month_trans,
         gift_id,
         COUNT(DISTINCT agent_id) AS new_users
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`,
       UNNEST(first_trans_gift_list) AS gift_id
  WHERE mau_type = '1.New'
    AND month_trans >= DATE_SUB((SELECT MAX(month_trans) FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`), INTERVAL 2 MONTH)
  GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT *,
       LAG(new_users) OVER (PARTITION BY gift_id ORDER BY month_trans) AS prev_month_users,
       new_users - LAG(new_users) OVER (PARTITION BY gift_id ORDER BY month_trans) AS abs_change,
       SAFE_DIVIDE(
         new_users - LAG(new_users) OVER (PARTITION BY gift_id ORDER BY month_trans),
         LAG(new_users) OVER (PARTITION BY gift_id ORDER BY month_trans)
       ) AS mom_growth
FROM new_gift
QUALIFY LAG(new_users) OVER (PARTITION BY gift_id ORDER BY month_trans) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY abs_change DESC
Gold Result (summary): N rows, mỗi gift_id có MoM growth, sắp xếp theo abs_change giảm dần → gift nào drive tăng trưởng

Question (NL): User churn bao lâu quay lại, có dùng promo k
Target Columns: agent_id, mau_type, first_trans_ispromo, is_using_promo, spending_vts, trans_vts, is_retain_next_month, month_trans
Business Rules / Notes: User Reactive: mau_type = '3.Reactive'. Promo-driven: first_trans_ispromo = 1 (giao dịch đầu tiên quay lại có dùng promo). Organic return: first_trans_ispromo = 0. Cần kết hợp với thời gian absent (từ LAG). So sánh spending, trans, retention giữa 2 nhóm, tách theo absent duration
Gold SQL:
WITH user_timeline AS (
  SELECT agent_id, month_trans, mau_type, first_trans_ispromo,
         spending_vts, trans_vts, is_retain_next_month,
         LAG(month_trans) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_id ORDER BY month_trans) AS prev_active_month
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`
),
reactive_detail AS (
  SELECT *,
         DATE_DIFF(month_trans, prev_active_month, MONTH) AS months_absent,
         CASE WHEN first_trans_ispromo = 1 THEN 'promo_driven' ELSE 'organic_return' END AS return_type
  FROM user_timeline
  WHERE mau_type = '3.Reactive'
    AND prev_active_month IS NOT NULL
    AND month_trans BETWEEN '2025-10-01' AND '2026-01-01'
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN months_absent <= 3 THEN 'short_absence (1-2m)'
    WHEN months_absent <= 7 THEN 'medium_absence (3-6m)'
    ELSE 'long_absence (>6m)'
  END AS absence_group,
  return_type,
  COUNT(DISTINCT agent_id) AS users,
  AVG(spending_vts) AS avg_spending,
  AVG(trans_vts) AS avg_trans,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(SUM(is_retain_next_month), COUNT(DISTINCT agent_id)) AS retention_rate
FROM reactive_detail
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1, 2
Gold Result (summary): ~6 rows (3 absence groups × 2 return types) với spending + retention

Question (NL): Retention rate tháng này như nào?
Target Columns: agent_id, is_retain_next_month, month_trans, user_id, created_date, result_code, trans_type
Business Rules / Notes: Agent cần hiểu 'tháng này như nào' = so sánh MTD (month-to-date). Retention rate tháng hiện tại chưa kết thúc → cần dùng proxy: tính % user tháng trước có giao dịch MTD tháng này (từ ALL_TRANS). So sánh running rate này với cùng thời điểm MTD tháng trước đó. Ví dụ: đang ngày 15 tháng 1/2026 → tính % user tháng 12 đã active trong 1-15/1 → compare với % user tháng 11 đã active trong 1-15/12. Nếu agent chỉ trả is_retain_next_month tháng trước = chưa đủ vì đó là full-month, không phải running rate
Gold SQL:
-- Giả sử đang ở ngày 15/1/2026
-- Running retention tháng 1: % user tháng 12 đã có giao dịch trong 1-15/1
WITH dec_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT agent_id
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`
  WHERE month_trans = '2025-12-01'
),
jan_mtd_active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_id
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_ALL_TRANS`
  WHERE result_code = 0
    AND trans_type IN ('pay_pl','pay_ins','send_pl')
    AND created_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-01-15'
),
-- So sánh: running retention tháng 12 tại cùng thời điểm (1-15/12)
nov_users AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT agent_id
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_MAU_SEGMENT`
  WHERE month_trans = '2025-11-01'
),
dec_mtd_active AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT user_id
  FROM `momovn-prod.BU_FI.PAYLATER_ALL_TRANS`
  WHERE result_code = 0
    AND trans_type IN ('pay_pl','pay_ins','send_pl')
    AND created_date BETWEEN '2025-12-01' AND '2025-12-15'
)
SELECT 'Jan 2026 MTD (1-15)' AS period,
       COUNT(DISTINCT d.agent_id) AS prev_month_users,
       COUNT(DISTINCT j.user_id) AS retained_mtd,
       SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT j.user_id), COUNT(DISTINCT d.agent_id)) AS running_retention
FROM dec_users d
LEFT JOIN jan_mtd_active j ON d.agent_id = j.user_id
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Dec 2025 MTD (1-15)',
       COUNT(DISTINCT n.agent_id),
       COUNT(DISTINCT dm.user_id),
       SAFE_DIVIDE(COUNT(DISTINCT dm.user_id), COUNT(DISTINCT n.agent_id))
FROM nov_users n
LEFT JOIN dec_mtd_active dm ON n.agent_id = dm.user_id
Gold Result (summary): 2 rows: MTD running retention vs Last month running retention (apples-to-apples)
